description: Configure a recurring service offering and register a customer subscription in iDempiere. Create a service product named 'Premium Garden Care' (Search Key: 'SVC-GARDEN-001', Type: 'Service', UOM: 'Each', Tax Category: 'Standard'). Define a 'Monthly Care Plan' subscription type with a monthly frequency. Register a subscription named 'C&W HQ Maintenance 2025' for business partner 'C&W Construction' using these new records. Set the start and paid-until dates to 01/01/2025 and the renewal date to 02/01/2025.
